name: please-shoot-the-zombies
description: Retro pixel art multiplayer shooter — defend the bunker from zombies

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const s=p.join(process.cwd(),'node_modules/three/build/three.min.js');const d=p.join(process.cwd(),'lib/three.min.js');if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(d),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(s,d);console.log('Copied three.min.js to lib/');}"
